verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm alive 'Cause Jesus gave me life He opened up my eyes I can see clearly now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Everybody, give it up for Jesus Give Him glory, for He has redeemed us Everybody, give it up for Jesus Praise His name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My desire Is to lift You higher It's only burning brighter This passion inside of me
